foundation_tasks.title: Create Repository Skeleton
foundation_tasks.scope: Repository skeleton, folder structure, initial SPEC files.

foundation_tasks.title: Implement Specification ID Linter
foundation_tasks.scope: Markdown scanner, ID validation, traceability CSV.

foundation_tasks.title: Generate Initial Task Backlog from SPEC Files
foundation_tasks.scope: Backlog generator, TASK.md generation, CSV output.

foundation_tasks.title: Implement Core Object Store
foundation_tasks.scope: SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, migrations, repository, lifecycle state machine, event log, baselines, unit tests.

domain_groups.title: Core Platform
domain_groups.scope: Core object model, versioning, event store, audit trail, baseline.

domain_groups.title: Core Object Store
domain_groups.scope: regulatory_object, object_version, object_relation, event_log, baseline, lifecycle, optimistic locking.

domain_groups.title: Product Domain
domain_groups.scope: Product master data, device hierarchy, regulatory identifiers.

domain_groups.title: Claim Domain
domain_groups.scope: Claim management, evidence linking, consistency checking.

domain_groups.title: Evidence Domain
domain_groups.scope: Evidence management, quality assessment, coverage analysis.

domain_groups.title: Risk Domain
domain_groups.scope: Risk management per ISO 14971, control measures, residual risk.

domain_groups.title: Report Generation
domain_groups.scope: DOCX/PDF generation, PER generation, traceability appendix.

domain_groups.title: AI/RAG Services
domain_groups.scope: Hybrid search, grounded drafting, audit trail.
